note: Hand-vetted surname/title/epithet aliases for Stage-4 Pass-1 name recovery (Track A of the pass1-tail-and-recovery continue prompt). Merged ADDITIVELY (fill-only) on top of alias-resolver.json by scripts/stage4-pass1-edge-candidates.py; this file is NEVER read by, and NEVER mutates, working/wiki/data/alias-resolver.json. Each key is to_slug(cleaned raw name) exactly as the cell appears in a Pass 1 'Relationships Observed' table; each value is a verified-existing canonical graph node slug. CONSERVATIVE set only: single-referent or title/epithet-disambiguated. Bare ambiguous surnames (bolton, manderly, drumm, serry), multi-name cells, and generic/collective cells are deliberately EXCLUDED and remain queued for Matt. The resolver's rung-b guard (alias_target must be in node_set) means a stale target simply fails to resolve rather than producing a bad edge.
